trends.name: PDRN Cream (Skincare Regenerative)
trends.viral_hook: Korean skincare regenerative ingredient — PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) promotes collagen production and skin healing. Before/after transformation videos showing anti-aging results. ExplodingTopics growth: +5900%.
trends.notes: Massive ExplodingTopics surge sustained week-over-week. Beauty niche with high engagement. PDRN is the new buzz ingredient replacing retinol in TikTok skincare circles. Higher price point ($30-60) means better commissions.

trends.name: GLP-1 Supplement (Natural Weight Loss)
trends.viral_hook: Natural alternative to Ozempic/Wegovy — GLP-1 supplements for appetite control and glucose metabolism. 'Natural Ozempic' trend driving massive search volume. FDA scrutiny on compounded GLP-1 drugs pushing consumers toward supplements.
trends.notes: Ozempic/weight loss trend continues to dominate. GLP-1 supplements are the affiliate-safe alternative. High price point ($40-80/month) and recurring purchases. Massive audience overlap with fitness community. Search volume stable from last week.

trends.name: Cat Toothpaste (Pet Dental Care)
trends.viral_hook: Specialised cat toothpaste in poultry/malt flavors — pet owners show their cats tolerating (or loving) toothbrushing. 'My cat's dental hygiene journey' format with before/after of tartar removal.
trends.notes: Pet niche is evergreen and highly engaged. Recurring purchase (monthly toothpaste replacement). Niche enough to have low competition, broad enough for good volume. Consistent performer.

trends.name: Plant Chocolate Protein Powder
trends.viral_hook: Vegan chocolate protein powder — smoothie and protein shake recipe content. 'Healthy chocolate' angle appeals to both fitness and wellness audiences. Plant-based + chocolate = guilt-free indulgence.
trends.notes: Vegan protein is a massive and growing market. Recurring purchases from subscription models. Good for recipe/demo content. Late May through summer is peak fitness season.

trends.name: Podcast Microphone (USB Condenser)
trends.viral_hook: Affordable USB podcast microphone for content creators — setup tutorials and 'upgrade your audio quality' videos. Creator economy driving demand. Unboxing and audio comparison content is highly shareable.
trends.notes: Highest volume product this week at 60.5K. Creator economy boom = sustained demand. Higher ticket ($50-150) = better commissions. Endless comparison/review content possible. Summer is peak podcast launch season.

trends.name: PDRN Toner (Anti-Aging Skincare)
trends.viral_hook: PDRN-infused toner for anti-aging — smooths fine lines, softens dryness, revives tired skin. Companion product to PDRN cream. Layered skincare routine videos drive sales.
trends.notes: Riding the PDRN wave. Lower individual price ($15-30) but high volume. Stacking with PDRN cream creates upsell opportunity. Beauty TikTok is the most engaged audience.

trends.name: Sony PlayStation Plus Price Hike
trends.viral_hook: Sony increasing PlayStation Plus subscription prices — gamers searching for alternatives and renewal info before price goes into effect. Gaming community outrage driving discussion.
trends.notes: Fresh Google Trends signal — price hike news broke in last 10 hours. Good opportunity for gaming/gadget content. Can target gift card or hardware affiliate linking.

trends.name: Apple Card AirPods Pro Promo
trends.viral_hook: Apple Card promotional financing for AirPods Pro — 0% APR financing deal driving searches. Tech deal hunters looking for best price on premium wireless earbuds.
trends.notes: AirPods Pro are premium ($200+) with excellent commission. Promo-driven surge means people are actively shopping. Fresh trend from Google Trends Shopping category.

trends.name: Posture Corrector Device
trends.viral_hook: Before/after transformations showing posture improvement for remote workers. 'Worn for 30 days — what changed' format continues to perform. Work-from-home permanence driving sustained demand.
trends.notes: Work-from-home permanence driving sustained demand. Broad demographic appeal — office workers, gamers, elderly. Evergreen product with consistent TikTok performance. No ExplodingTopics change — classic evergreen.

trends.name: Mini LED Projector
trends.viral_hook: Turn your bedroom wall into a movie theatre — compact, affordable, perfect for small spaces. Summer outdoor movie season now in full swing.
trends.notes: Summer outdoor movie season now at peak — late May is prime time. Higher ticket item ($50-150) means better commission per sale. Seasonal peak is May-July.

trends.name: Neck Fan (Portable Wearable)
trends.viral_hook: Hands-free personal fan — summer essential for commuting, outdoor work, and events. Dual-blade design with neckband form factor.
trends.notes: Seasonal peak arriving (Northern Hemisphere summer). Classic seasonal trending product with predictable demand surge. Late May is perfect timing.

trends.name: Pet Hair Remover (ChomChom-style)
trends.viral_hook: Satisfying before/after of pet hair removal from furniture. 'Look how much hair this removed' reveal format drives insane share rates.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1M+ views, high share rate across pet communities
trends.notes: Pet owner market is massive and emotionally engaged. Reusable design appeals to eco-conscious buyers. Spring shedding season = peak demand (running through June).

trends.name: LED Strip Lights (Smart RGBIC)
trends.viral_hook: Room transformation videos — gaming setups, bedroom aesthetics, music-synced lighting displays. 'TikTok made me buy it' category leader.
trends.notes: Evergreen TikTok product — consistent volume year-round. Low price ($10-30), broad demographic appeal.

source_summary: Searched via CloakBrowser (stealth Chromium): ExplodingTopics.com (live trend data showing volume + growth percentages), Google Trends Shopping category trending searches (past 24h, geo=US). Amazon Movers & Shakers returned generic page (blocked). Cross-referenced fresh ExplodingTopics data with established TikTok/Instagram viral product patterns for late May 2026. New Google Trends signals: Sony PlayStation Plus price hike (+200%, 20K+ searches), Apple Card AirPods Pro promo (+75%, 2K+ searches).
